title: viola × tigirekica
intro: Viola × tigirekica is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Viola adunca and Viola langsdorffii. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Traditionally, Viola × tigirekica has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
